//: Intentionally empty for the monorepo-wide `pnpm typecheck` (which runs `tsc --noEmit` per workspace). Astro's real type story relies on `.astro/types.d.ts`, generated by `astro sync` / `astro dev`. Outside that environment (e.g. fresh CI checkouts) the file doesn't exist and `src/**/*` only matches `.astro` files — which tsc doesn't accept as input — so `tsc --noEmit` would fail with TS18003 'No inputs were found'. To typecheck the Astro app properly, run `pnpm --filter astro-app exec astro check` after `astro sync`.
